name: a429SetScheduleTx
title: a429SetScheduleTx
syntax: dword a429SetScheduleTx( a429word myA429word, dword myCycle );
description: Prepare an ARINC word to be transmitted cyclically by means of the hardware scheduling support. Calling this function modifies the selectors TxCycle and TxCtrl.
Note: This modifies the ARINC word attributes only. For transmission call the function output.
